---
title: "Fig S3. ceRNA network of key effector genes."
author: "Liang Huang"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---
Alluvial maps show the correlations between mRNA, miRNA and lncRNA. Color of each RNA are fixed to enhance the visibility of differences.
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# devtools::install_github("davidsjoberg/ggsankey")
library(ggsankey)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(RColorBrewer)

setwd("E:/博士2023-2025/课题/跨组织转录组-肠道微生物/ceRNA/")
net=read.csv("./network.csv",row.names = 1)
int=c("NOCT", "MVK", "FOXO3",
      "RORC", "AKR1C19", "GPCPD1",
      "NR1D1", "TRAM2", "CRY1",
      "FKBP5", "NAMPT", "TTLL12")
int=tolower(int)
substring(int,1,1)=toupper(substring(int,1,1))

df1=net[net$gene1%in%int,]
df2=net[net$gene2%in%int,]

df1_2=df1[df1$gene2_type=="miRNA",c(1:2,7)]
df2_2=df2[df2$gene1_type=="miRNA",c(2:1,7)]
names(df2_2)=names(df1_2)
m_mi=rbind(df1_2,df2_2)
names(m_mi)=c("mRNA","miRNA","condition")
m_mi=na.omit(m_mi)
df1_3=net[net$gene2_type=="lncRNA" & net$gene1_type=="miRNA",c(1:2,7)]
df2_3=net[net$gene1_type=="lncRNA" & net$gene2_type=="miRNA",c(2:1,7)]
names(df2_3)=names(df1_3)
mi_lnc=rbind(df1_3,df2_3)
names(mi_lnc)=c("miRNA","lncRNA","condition")
mi_lnc=mi_lnc[mi_lnc$miRNA %in% m_mi$miRNA,]
mi_lnc=na.omit(mi_lnc)
color=c(brewer.pal(9,name = "Set1"),
        brewer.pal(12,name = "Paired"),
        brewer.pal(6,name = "Dark2"),
        colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(8,name = "Accent"))(60))
names=c(unique(m_mi$mRNA),unique(m_mi$miRNA),unique(mi_lnc$lncRNA))
names(color)=names

plot=list()
for (condi in c("GF","FMT","SPF")){
  temp_data=left_join(m_mi[m_mi$condition==condi,],mi_lnc[mi_lnc$condition==condi,-3],by = "miRNA")
  sankey_data <- temp_data %>%
    make_long(mRNA, miRNA, lncRNA)
p=ggplot(sankey_data, aes(x = x,
                          next_x = next_x,
                          node = node,
                          next_node = next_node,
                          fill = factor(node),
                          label = node)) +
    geom_sankey(flow.alpha = 0.5, node.color = "black") +
    geom_sankey_label(size = 3, color = "black", fill = "white",hjust=0) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = color)+scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0,0))+
    theme_sankey(base_size = 8) +coord_cartesian(clip = "off")+
    theme(legend.position = "none",
          # plot.title = element_text(size = 14,hjust = 0.5,vjust = 0),
          axis.title = element_text(angle = 90,size = 14,hjust = 0.5,vjust = 0),
          axis.text = element_blank(),
          margins = margin(b=0,t=0,r=50,l=10),
          axis.ticks = element_blank()) +
    labs(x="",y = condi)
plot[[condi]]=p
}

combined_plot <- wrap_plots(plot, ncol = 3)+
  theme(margins = margin(b=0,t=0,r=50,l=0),
)
ggsave("sankey_ggsankey.pdf", width = 12*3/2.53, height = 30/2.53)
```
